title: An Ordinance Prohibiting the Manufacture, Sale, Distribution, Possession or Use of Firecrackers or Pyrotechnic Devices and Such Other Similar Devices and the Exploding of Fire Crackers or Other Similar Explosives Within the Territorial Jurisdiction of the Municipality of Los Baños. (AUTHORS: COUNCILOR(S) Marlo Pj A. Alipon, Mike Dexter A. Concio, Mark Lester B. Dizon, Cris Dayril B. Bagnes, Jozylyn N. Manansala, 12/30/2020)
